home.headline: Games you'll love.
home.tagline: We craft fun experiences made to play with everyone.

el-infiltrado.description: A fun party game where friends try to find the infiltrator among the group. Perfect for gatherings — no app needed for players.

word-rush.description: A fast-paced word game that tests your vocabulary and reflexes. Play solo or challenge your friends in real time.

cube-quest.description: A satisfying puzzle game where you stack, balance and explode cubes through increasingly creative levels.

about.label: Our studio
about.title: We build games that bring people together
about.body: We are an independent studio passionate about creating unique gaming experiences. Every title we develop is designed to generate fun moments — whether at gatherings, on trips, or just at home.
about.v1modalBody: We design every mechanic to generate laughs and great moments. We believe the best games are the ones that make people want to play just one more round.
about.v2modalBody: From the very first game, anyone can join without reading a manual. Simplicity is a design decision, not a limitation.
about.v3modalBody: Our games come alive when played with others. Every mechanic is designed to spark conversations, tension, and memorable group moments.

gamesSection.label: Collection
gamesSection.title: Our games
gamesSection.subtitle: Download for free and start playing.

bento.title: Everything you need for the perfect game night.
bento.subtitle: El Infiltrado is designed for everyone to have fun, no hassle.
bento.c1title: Can you find the infiltrator among your friends?
bento.c2desc: Only the host needs the app. Everyone else plays from the main screen.
bento.c3desc: Random roles and new words make sure no two games are ever the same.
bento.c5desc: Download for free and start your first game in under a minute.

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.title: What our players say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of rounds played around the world.
testimonials.r1: El Infiltrado became the go-to game at every family gathering. Everyone wants to play!
testimonials.r2: Super easy to understand and really fun. We downloaded it for a game night and ended up playing until 3am.
testimonials.r3: I love that not everyone needs the game installed. Perfect for any gathering.
testimonials.r4: The infiltrator dynamic is brilliant. Every round is different and always full of tension.
testimonials.r5: Simple, addictive and very funny. Exactly what I was looking for to play with friends.
testimonials.r6: Perfect for breaking the ice at gatherings where people don't know each other well.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our games.
faq.q1: Where can I download the games?
faq.a1: Our games are available on Google Play for Android devices.
faq.a2: Yes, all our games are free to download. Some include optional in-app purchases.
faq.a3: Our games are compatible with Android devices. iOS support is coming soon.
faq.q4: Will there be more games coming soon?
faq.a4: Yes! We are actively developing new titles. Follow us on social media to stay updated on upcoming releases.
faq.q5: How can I contact the team?
faq.a5: You can reach us through the contact forms on each game page, or send us a message on our social media channels.

footer.description: Independent studio crafting mobile games to connect people.
